jd_text: ***Salary up to 90,000 AED***Open to relocation We are partnering with a prominent real estate developer to appoint a Vice President – Design & Technical, a strategic leadership role responsible for the full governance, direction, and performance of the design function across a portfolio of large-scale developments.This role sits at executive level and will drive design excellence, commercial performance, innovation, compliance, and cross-functional integration from concept through construction and project handover.The VP will lead multidisciplinary technical teams, oversee international design consultants, and ensure world-class delivery aligned with corporate objectives and board-level expectations. The Vice President – Design & Technical will:Provide strategic leadership for all design and technical operationsEstablish governance frameworks and enforce Design Management Processes (DMP)Oversee consultant procurement, performance, and commercial managementDrive value engineering, cost optimisation, and constructability strategiesEnsure timely project delivery in alignment with executive approvalsServe as a key advisor to the Chairman, Managing Director, and VP ProjectsCore ResponsibilitiesStrategic Design LeadershipDefine and implement the organisation’s design vision, standards, and technical strategyOversee development of Project Briefs and secure executive-level approvalsEstablish professional services procurement strategies for all projectsLead consultant selection, negotiation, contracting, and fee evaluationEnsure alignment of design objectives with commercial and brand strategyChampion innovation, sustainability, and efficiency across all developmentsExecutive Oversight of Project DeliveryProvide executive governance over design delivery across multiple concurrent projectsOversee preparation and approval of Project Design Management Plans (PDMP)Ensure compliance with scope, timelines, quality standards, and cost parametersMonitor variation orders, change management processes, and risk mitigationReview and endorse major design submissions and technical decisionsLead Design Stage Gateway approvals with senior leadershipOversee tender documentation strategy and managementDrive value engineering initiatives throughout the project lifecycleEnsure constructability optimisation and cost-efficiency measuresProvide executive-level reporting on project design performanceCommercial & Financial AccountabilityPartner with Commercial and QS teams to validate cost estimates at each design stageOversee consultant and contractor progress validation for paymentsManage professional fee evaluations and negotiationsEnsure financial discipline within the design and technical functionMonitor scope changes and ensure proper executive approvalsCross-Functional Executive IntegrationEnsure the design function provides strategic support to:Sales (unit layouts, design data, product optimisation)Marketing (brand alignment, visual materials, show units)Commercial (tender and procurement documentation)Hospitality (operational design compliance)Projects (construction-stage technical governance, mockups, RFIs)Act as the primary technical advisor to the Project VP and executive leadership during construction phases.Organisational Leadership & Capability BuildingEstablish, structure, and scale the Design & Technical DepartmentDefine roles, responsibilities, and performance metricsLead recruitment strategy in collaboration with HRImplement leadership development and succession planning initiativesConduct executive-level performance reviews and goal settingFoster a culture of accountability, excellence, and innovationCompliance, Governance & Quality AssuranceEnsure strict adherence to DMP, HSE policies, and corporate governance standardsOversee authority approvals and regulatory compliance processesEnsure robust documentation, reporting systems, and digital tracking toolsCoordinate closely with commissioning teams to ensure world-class project handoverMaintain real-time transparency of technical performance metricsStakeholder & Board-Level EngagementMaintain executive alignment with Project Management teamsAdvise senior leadership on design risks, deviations, and corrective strategiesPresent design stage reports and strategic updates to Chairman and MDEnsure design performance meets corporate brand and quality benchmarks Candidate ProfileDegree in Architecture, Engineering, or related discipline (Master’s preferred)15+ years of progressive experience in design leadership within large-scale real estate developmentProven experience leading multidisciplinary teams and international consultantsStrong commercial acumen and cost governance experienceDeep understanding of authority approvals and regulatory processes in DubaiDemonstrated success delivering complex, high-value developmentsExecutive presence with strong board-level communication skillsStrategic thinker with operational depth REF: FL V-159124
